positive: A whimsical and vibrant illustration of a forest gathering: stylized, symmetrical arrangement of friendly woodland creatures (raccoons, deer, foxes, owls) interacting with glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate wildflowers. The overall style is neo-Victorian storybook mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e aesthetic, rendered in deep jewel tones, forest emeralds, sapphire blues, and rich gold accents. Strong, clean black outlines and flat color blocking are emphasized. The composition is designed to fill a central square space, ensuring clear silhouettes and high contrast against a subtly textured background. Overhead lighting casting magical spotlights, perfect for merchandise art. Centered composition, high detail.
negative: blurry, artifacts, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor composition, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, out of frame, extra limbs
